event.menu_description: What would you like to do?
event.menu_create_desc: Launch the creation wizard in DM
event.menu_my_events_desc: View events I'm signed up for

config.menu_description: Configure the bot for this server
config.channels_desc: Define channels where events can be posted
config.roles_desc: Define roles that can create events
config.stats_channel_desc: Define the channel for summaries and stats

wizard.start_description: I'll guide you step by step to create your event. You can cancel at any time.
wizard.timeout: ⏰ The wizard has expired due to inactivity. Please restart the creation.
wizard.channel_description: In which channel would you like to publish the event?
wizard.datetime_description:
Enter the event date and time.
Format: **DD/MM/YYYY HH:MM**
Timezone: **{timezone}**
wizard.datetime_invalid: ❌ Invalid date format. Use DD/MM/YYYY HH:MM
wizard.datetime_past: ❌ The date must be in the future.
wizard.duration_description: What is the estimated duration of the event?
wizard.image_description: Enter an image URL for the event (optional).
wizard.image_invalid: ❌ Invalid URL. Enter a valid URL or skip this step.
wizard.template_description: Choose a template for signup options.
wizard.max_participants_description:
Set a global participant limit? (optional)
Enter a number or skip for no limit.
wizard.max_participants_invalid: ❌ Enter a valid number between 1 and 200.
wizard.ping_role_description: Which role should be mentioned when the event is published?
wizard.allowed_roles_description:
Which roles can sign up? (optional)
Leave empty to allow everyone.
wizard.close_date_description:
When should registrations close?
Format: **DD/MM/YYYY HH:MM** or skip for automatic closing at event time.
wizard.reminders_description:
When should reminders be sent?
Select one or more reminders.
wizard.success_description: Your event **{title}** has been published in {channel}.

events.embed_footer: EventForge • Click a button to sign up
events.registration_waitlisted: 📋 You are on the waitlist (position #{pos}) for **{option}**.
events.registration_promoted: 🎉 You've been promoted! You are now signed up for **{title}** as **{option}**.
events.registration_closed: 🔒 Registrations are closed for this event.
events.registration_not_allowed: 🚫 You don't have the required role to sign up.
events.my_events_empty: You are not signed up for any upcoming events.
events.cancel_confirm: ⚠️ Are you sure you want to cancel this event?

stats.title: 📊 Statistics — {guild}
stats.export_description: Here are the exported statistics in CSV format.

config.channels_description:
Select channels where events can be posted.
Currently: {current}
config.roles_description:
Select roles that can create events.
Currently: {current}
config.stats_channel_description: Select the channel for post-event summaries and statistics.
config.reminders_description: Select default reminders sent for each event.
config.templates_description: Manage signup templates for the server.

errors.no_permission: 🚫 You don't have permission to perform this action.
errors.admin_only: 🚫 This command is reserved for administrators.
errors.not_in_guild: ❌ This command can only be used in a server.
errors.dm_failed: ❌ Unable to send you a DM. Please check your privacy settings.
errors.channel_not_allowed: ❌ This channel is not allowed for events.
errors.cooldown: ⏳ Please wait before using this command again.
